speaker: speaker2
text: There have been charges made on my debit card that I didn ’ t make .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have the statement for your card ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What are the charges you ’ re referring to ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The last four charges on the page .

speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ m afraid we ’ re going to have to investigate these charges .

speaker: speaker2
text: How long will an investigation take ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I honestly don ’ t know , but we will freeze payment on these charges .
